title: The Hills
why_this_song: The Hills by The Weeknd (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 13 times; first heard in: "When I'm fucked up, that's the real me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fucked" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fucked" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "that's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "that's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Your man on the road, he doin' promo
I'ma let you know and keep it simple
The only time I'd ever call you mine

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You said, "Keep our business on the low-low"
Drugs started feelin' like it's decaf'
When I'm fucked up, that's the real me

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The Hills" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The Hills" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "The Hills" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "The Hills", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "The Hills" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "The Hills" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
